caption:
Some scents don't whisper — they detonate.

Fantomas by Nasomatto arrived just in time for the season to begin, and it carries that particular energy of someone who has already decided how the story ends. Dark, anarchic, magnetic — a fragrance that doesn't ask for permission to take over a room. Spring never felt this dangerously good.

Fragrance: @nasomatto

Only at Blink
